title: Writing by hand is good for your brain
author: dwwoelfel
aiHeadline: Apparently, writing by hand is the new gym for your brain, because apparently, typing on a keyboard isn't enough to keep those neurons firing.

title: Startup founders urge U.S. government not to shut off Chinese open weight AI
author: theanonymousone
aiHeadline: Startup founders are so desperate they're begging the government to let Chinese AI stay open, probably because they're too busy building their own empires to notice the irony.

title: AI Companies Are Trying to Hide a Staggering Amount of Debt
author: technewssss
aiHeadline: AI companies are hiding debt so deep it's like they're playing a game of hide and seek with their creditors, and the creditors are losing.

title: Tell HN: Namecheap gave my account to an unverified third party
author: Thrashed
aiHeadline: Namecheap hands over your account to a random stranger, because why not? It's like a game of Russian roulette with your online identity.

title: What happened to TheNumbers.com
author: nickthegreek
aiHeadline: TheNumbers.com disappears into the night, probably bought by a competitor who now has all the data, making it the most exclusive club in town.
